data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs interfaces where target selection time is minimized.
data.technical_spec: Clickable elements with optimal spacing and size.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Limits decision-making time for users by minimizing choices.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined options on initial landing pages.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Utilizes visual grouping to enhance user experience.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of proximity, similarity, and continuity.

data.title: The Law of Common Region
data.description: Groups relateable UI elements to improve navigation.
data.technical_spec: Sections and icons enclosed within delineated regions.

data.title: Accessibility Compliance
data.description: Ensures the site is usable for all users, including those with disabilities.
data.technical_spec: WCAG 2.1 standards, ARIA roles, and alt-text descriptions.
